item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-54232 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-54232 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
vLLM is an inference and serving engine for large language models (LLMs). Prior to 0.22.1, the vLLM Dockerfile is vulnerable to a dependency confusion attack through the flashinfer-jit-cache package. The package is installed from a custom index (flashinfer.ai/whl/) using --extra-index-url, but the package name was not registered on PyPI, and UV_INDEX_STRATEGY="unsafe-best-match" is set globally. An attacker who regis...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54232

item.title: [Segurança] Cisco Unified CM Flaw Exploited After PoC Reveals File-Write Path to Root
item.description:
🚨 Cisco Unified CM Flaw Exploited After PoC Reveals File-Write Path to Root
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.6
Resumo:
Threat actors have begun to exploit a recently disclosed critical security flaw impacting Cisco Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) and Unified Communications Manager Session Management Edition (Unified CM SME). The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-20230 (CVSS score: 8.6), is a case of improper input validation for specific HTTP requests that could allow an unauthenticated, remote
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/cisco-unified-cm-flaw-exploited-after.html

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-53755 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-53755 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.6
Resumo:
Crawl4AI is an open-source LLM friendly web crawler & scraper. Prior to 0.8.9, the Docker API server applied its SSRF destination check to the crawl target URL only, not to the proxy address. An unauthenticated request could supply a proxy pointing at an internal IP and route the browser through it, reaching internal services and cloud-metadata endpoints, while using a perfectly valid crawl URL. The Docker API is una...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53755

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-7842 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-7842 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.8
Resumo:
The Infility Global Infility Global WordPress plugin before 2.15.20 for WordPress does not sanitize or validate the orderby and order parameters in the import_list(), url_detail(), and file_detail() admin page callbacks before using them in SQL queries, allowing authenticated attackers with Editor-level access or higher to perform time-based blind SQL injection and extract sensitive data from the database. The Import...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7842

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-53571 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-53571 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Vite is a frontend tooling framework for JavaScript. Prior to 8.0.16, 7.3.5, and 6.4.3, the contents of files that are specified by server.fs.deny can be returned to the browser on Windows. Vite’s dev server denies direct access to sensitive files through server.fs.deny, including entries such as .env, .env.*, and *.{crt,pem}. However, on Windows, the deny logic does not correctly normalize NTFS ADS path forms before...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53571

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-54762 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-54762 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Traefik is an HTTP reverse proxy and load balancer. From 3.7.0-ea.1 until 3.7.5, there is a medium severity vulnerability in Traefik's Kubernetes Ingress NGINX provider that causes affected routes to fail open. When an Ingress explicitly enables BasicAuth or DigestAuth through the supported nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/auth-type and auth-secret annotations, but the referenced auth Secret cannot be resolved or parsed,...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54762

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-54323 - Elastic
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-54323 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.9
Resumo:
Daytona is a secure and elastic infrastructure runtime for AI-generated code execution and agent workflows. Prior to 0.185.0, the daemon's git clone implementation disabled TLS certificate verification. When a clone request carried Git credentials, the daemon sent the HTTP Basic Authorization header to the remote over a connection whose certificate was never validated, on both the go-git and native git CLI code paths...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54323

item.title: [Segurança] Cordyceps CI/CD Flaws Expose 300+ GitHub Repositories to Supply-Chain Attacks
item.description:
💣 Cordyceps CI/CD Flaws Expose 300+ GitHub Repositories to Supply-Chain Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a new class of CI/CD workflow weakness that allows attackers to hijack workflows and compromise open-source supply chains. The "critical exploitable pattern" has been codenamed Cordyceps by Novee Security. The issue can allow full attacker control of repositories at dozens of the largest organizations worldwide, including Microsoft, Google, Apache, and
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/cordyceps-cicd-flaws-expose-300-github.html

item.title: [Segurança] CISA warns of max severity Ubiquiti flaws exploited in attacks
item.description:
💣 CISA warns of max severity Ubiquiti flaws exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) is warning of hackers actively exploiting flaws in Ubiquity UniFi OS and Lantronix serial-to-ethernet servers.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-warns-of-max-severity-ubiquiti-flaws-exploited-in-attacks/

CVSS: N/D

item.title: [Infraestrutura] PostgreSQL Diagnostic Superpowers: Deep Visibility with VMware Data Services Manager 9.1
item.description:
📰 PostgreSQL Diagnostic Superpowers: Deep Visibility with VMware Data Services Manager 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Every database practitioner knows the dread of the classic “black box” window. An application response time spikes, a critical service slows to a crawl, and the classic cross-team finger-pointing begins. As a DBA or platform engineer, you are suddenly responsible for finding the missing piece of the puzzle.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/23/postgresql-diagnostic-superpowers-deep-visibility-with-vmware-data-services-manager-9-1/

item.title: [Segurança] Stealthy Mistic backdoor linked to ransomware access broker KongTuke
item.description:

Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new backdoor dubbed Mistic has been observed in financially motivated attacks targeting organizations in the insurance, education, IT, and professional services sectors.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/stealthy-mistic-backdoor-linked-to-ransomware-access-broker-kongtuke/

item.title: [Segurança] New macOS ClickFix attack silently mounts DMGs to push infostealer
item.description:
📰 New macOS ClickFix attack silently mounts DMGs to push infostealer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new macOS ClickFix campaign is using Terminal commands to silently download, mount, and launch info-stealing malware from malicious disk image (DMG) files.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-macos-clickfix-attack-silently-mounts-dmgs-to-push-infostealer/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] What is an SBOM (and Why Can’t You Ship Without One)?
item.description:
📰 What is an SBOM (and Why Can’t You Ship Without One)?
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In Omdia's 2026 software supply chain security report, 73% of organizations that generate SBOMs say they enable more efficient vulnerability mitigation, yet 86% still find the generation process challenging. That gap between recognized value and operational difficulty is where most teams are stuck. For teams building and securing containerized applications, understanding what an SBOM is,...
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/what-is-an-sbom/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] How migrating to Elastic Security helped a digital safety software company cut incidents by 85% with UnderDefense
item.description:
📰 How migrating to Elastic Security helped a digital safety software company cut incidents by 85% with UnderDefense
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
UnderDefense, an Elastic partner, migrated a two-person security team from a noisy legacy QRadar to Elastic Security on AWS, cutting incident volume 85%, reducing MTTR 61%, and delivering audit-ready retention with 25 purpose-built dashboards.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/elastic-security-migration-with-underdefense
